title: 吠えろ、女傑のタイマン道

text_block_list.text: The day before tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, that crisp acceleration! Narita Brian's raw talent truly is
impossible to ignore.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
She's still rough around the edges, but that just means she has endless
potential. I'm looking forward to her performance during tryouts
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Figures... The real race isn't even 'til tomorrow, but she's already
snagged the spotlight. Oh well, that just gets me even more fired up!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hishiama...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh... Were you watching Brian too?

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
She really is on a whole other level. Are you serious about going
one-on-one with her?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Dead serious. You should definitely come check it out. It'll be a race
to remember!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hishiama... Why do you even care about some nobody like me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Someday you're gonna have what it takes to toughen me up—so I can't just let you walk away. That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
On that note... Hey, Trainer! Quit staring at Brian and help me get
some last-minute practice in! What's on the docket for today?

Brian is undeniably a formidable opponent, but there's no doubt that
Amazon's skills are evolving as well.

Thanks to her instincts and natural learning ability, our sessions yield
results day by day, fostering her continued improvement.
After wrapping up our training, the big day arrives.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The last race of today's tryouts will be commencing shortly! All eyes
are on Narita Brian, whose talents have won her high acclaim!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume have all gathered at the starting gates. Let the
2,000-meter turf race... begin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian falls from fourth to fifth place, seemingly unconcerned by
the widening gap in front of her! It's like she's out for a morning jog,
folks!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her movements are being carefully scrutinized by Hishi Amazon in
seventh place! And with that, they're through the first lap!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hishiama...

Halfway through the race, Brian makes an early move and advances
into third place.
Then, as the runners round the fourth corner...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll tear this track up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And there goes Narita Brian! Brian takes the lead! She's ahead of the
pack by three—now four lengths!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hah, I don't think so. Time for a one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is closing in from the outside! She's holding her own
against Brian with her powerful stride!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Took you long enough. But don't get cocky!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
With a fearsome burst of speed, Narita Brian increases her pace even
further! She tries to give Amazon the slip, but—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Brian can't shake her off! Amazon accelerates too! A fierce battle is
unfolding before our eyes right here on the final straight!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: H-Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
("Impossible" my ass! "Over" my ass! No matter how many times you
lose, it doesn't mean a thing!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (As long as you refuse to lose to yourself right up to the bitter end, the match is never over!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!
Ultimately, Amazon comes in a close second, just shy of Brian.

But her powerful performance stirs the hearts of the spectators,
earning her a rousing round of applause.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Dammit, I lost! But still—

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sniffle, sob... Hishiamaaa! Th... That... That was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, there's no reason to blubber like that. So? You still planning
on leaving the school?

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Forget I said anything about it! I'm so pumped up, I'm going to start
training again from square one!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And someday... I'll be strong enough to go one-on-one with you,
Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! I can't wait!
...Oh, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ama. I enjoyed that. Let's do it again sometime.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hah! Next time I'll be the one to tear up your track. Don't say I didn't warn you, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Hishi Amazon! I was really impressed by that competitive
spirit you displayed today. Please let me scout you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, about that... Sorry, but I've already found myself a training
partner.
Ain't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely. That training regimen of yours is part of the reason I was
able to go one-on-one with Brian in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm lookin' forward to even more hot-blooded battles from here on
out, Trainer... Hmm. Y'know, that sounds kinda stuffy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I know! How 'bout "Teach"?
choice_data_list: Sounds like something out of an old movie...
Sounds like something out of an old movie...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Like "Yeah, I dig it, Teach"? Hahaha, that's not half bad! Definitely
got a more friendly ring to it at least.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now then... Who should I go one-on-one with next, Teach?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, my days together with the ever-dynamic Amazon begin.
